tagline: Your One-Stop Shop for Commercial and Residential Landscaping Since 2003

hero.headline:
One Team for Your Entire Outdoor
Property
hero.subheadline: Landscapes, pools, trees, irrigation — Greenscapes has handled it all for Phoenix-area properties since 2003. Family-owned, fully licensed, and trusted by apartment communities across the Valley. Stop juggling vendors and let one team do it right.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Landscape, Pool & Tree Care<br class="hidden md:block"> All Under One Roof
services.subtitle: Stop hiring three different companies for your property. Greenscapes handles landscaping, pools, trees, and irrigation — so you get consistent quality from one trusted team.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Installation
cards.description: Complete outdoor transformations — grading, colorscaping, hardscapes, pavers, artificial turf, lighting, and water features. Designed for Arizona living.

cards.title: Commercial Property Maintenance
cards.description: Turf care, shrub trimming, fertilization, irrigation repair, weed control, and pest management. Built for apartment complexes and multi-housing communities.

cards.title: Tree Removal & Trimming
cards.description: Professional tree removals, trimming, and fertilization through our sister company Turning Leaf, LLC. Safe, insured, and done right the first time.

cards.title: Pool Design & Construction
cards.description: Custom swimming pool design, construction, and repair through Pool Hub, LLC. From backyard oasis concepts to finished pools ready for your first dive.

cards.title: Irrigation & Water Conservation
cards.description: Weathermatic Smartline controllers delivering an average 38% water savings. Reduce your water bill while keeping your landscape thriving in the Arizona heat.

cards.title: Custom Hardscape Projects
cards.description: Pavers, retaining walls, outdoor fireplaces, fire pits, BBQ islands, block work, stucco, and mailbox construction. Built to last in the desert climate.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Property

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Tell us about your property. We will walk the grounds, listen to your goals, and deliver an honest, no-pressure quote within 48 hours. No contracts required.

steps.title: We Design & Execute the Plan
steps.description: Our licensed, insured crews handle everything — landscape installation, pool construction, tree work, irrigation upgrades. One team, one point of contact, zero headaches.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Property Year-Round
steps.description: With ongoing maintenance and water-smart irrigation, your property stays pristine through every Arizona season. Issues come up? One call handles it all.

about.label: Why Property Owners Trust Greenscapes
about.headline: Family-Owned Since 2003 — Built on Handshakes, Not Sales Pitches
about.description: Greenscapes Landcare started as a family operation in 2003 and grew into the Valley's go-to team for apartment complexes, HOAs, and homeowners who want everything handled under one roof. With ALCA certification, BBB accreditation since 2011, and Weathermatic Premier Partner status, we bring institutional-grade quality with the personal touch of a family business. Our crews treat every property like their own because our reputation depends on it.

features.title: Licensed, Bonded & Insured
features.description: Full licensing, bonding, and insurance coverage on every job. Your property and our workers are always protected.

features.title: One-Stop Property Care
features.description: Landscape, pools, trees, irrigation — all managed by one company. No more juggling vendors, schedules, and invoices.

features.title: BBB Accredited Since 2011
features.description: Over a decade of Better Business Bureau accreditation. We resolve issues fast and stand behind every project we complete.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed written estimate upfront. No hidden fees, no change-order games — just honest pricing from a family business.

guarantee.headline: Our "Property Pride" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service we provide, we will return and make it right at no additional cost. We have built our reputation over 23 years by standing behind every job — from a simple trim to a full pool build. Your satisfaction is not negotiable.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start a new project?
faqs.answer: Most new projects are scheduled within 1-2 weeks depending on scope. For maintenance contracts, we can typically begin within 5 business days. Emergency tree removals get priority same-day or next-day response.

faqs.question: Do you handle both residential and commercial properties?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in apartment complexes and multi-housing communities, but we also serve homeowners across the Phoenix metro area. Every property gets the same level of professionalism and attention to detail.

faqs.question: Are your crews licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Greenscapes Landcare is fully licensed, bonded, and insured. We have been BBB accredited since 2011 and hold ALCA certification. Every crew member is trained and covered under our comprehensive insurance policies.

faqs.question: Can you handle my pool AND my landscaping?
faqs.answer: That is exactly what we do best. Through our sister companies Pool Hub, LLC and Turning Leaf, LLC, we provide pool construction, tree service, and full landscape care — all managed through one point of contact.

faqs.question: How do your water conservation solutions work?
faqs.answer: We install Weathermatic Smartline controllers that monitor weather and soil conditions to deliver precisely the right amount of water. Our clients see an average of 38% water savings, which means lower bills and a healthier landscape.

testimonials.name: Rachelle R.
testimonials.text: What I appreciate most about Greenscapes is how open they are to receiving feedback and supporting their customers with any questions or concerns. Excellent service.

testimonials.name: Mike M.
testimonials.text: We had a complete front and back landscaping redesign done by Greenscapes Landcare. We would recommend this company and its workers to anyone for any project.

testimonials.name: Haley H.
testimonials.text: Awesome company we've been working with them for about 2 years now and have nothing but good things to say!

benefits: 23+ years of Valley experience behind every project
